name: GREEN DOT CORP.CL.A DL-01
summary: Green Dot Corporation is a fintech and bank holding company offering financial technology and regulated banking products to a wide range of consumers. Headquartered in Pasadena, California, Green Dot provides prepaid debit cards, checking accounts, and mobile banking services through its retail and direct-to-consumer channels. The company focuses on serving underserved and unbanked populations.
